archived_by: PM (V1.49 P3 closed R-V148P0-W1: review-report path guard)

residual_findings.title: load_and_parse_review_report path resolution is app-controlled; recommend safe-resolve guard or invariant test before P1/P2 prompt injection surfaces
residual_findings.source: qc2 W-1 (P0 tri-review); closed in V1.49 P3
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P3 (commit c10e4337, merged at 17414d6): lexical + canonical path-traversal guard added to load_and_parse_review_report. Validates path is canonicalized (no .. segments, no symlink escape) and verified to be under Works/<work_ref>/. Rejects paths outside the work dir with structured error. Test load_and_parse_review_report_rejects_path_outside_work_dir covers the Works/<work_ref>/../../../etc/passwd shape. QA: 13 review_report tests + 25 auto_chain tests pass.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ 17414d6 (P3 merge) + c10e4337 (T3); qc1/qc2/qc3 all Approve; qa.md @ df793aae PASS
